feature: Notification Integration Hub — wire alert engine to Slack, Discord, webhook channels with history tracking and dashboard management
success_criteria: HTTP webhook sender: generic POST with JSON payload, custom headers, timeout, retry

Notification history DB table with delivery status, channel, agent, message preview
Dashboard notification settings page: enable/disable channels, configure URLs per channel
Dashboard notification history page: table view with channel/agent/status filter, pagination
CLI: acp notify list and acp notify test (send test message) commands
All 241 existing tests pass, 40+ new tests for notification senders and routing
README updated with notification setup and channel configuration
